queries: site:openai.com OpenAI blog GPT-4o retirement February 2026
action.query: site:openai.com OpenAI blog GPT-4o retirement February 2026

annotations.title: Retiring GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini in ChatGPT | OpenAI
ChatGPT — Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center
Model Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center
OpenAI Buys TBPN to Expand AI Conversation With Media Acquisition - Bloomberg
OpenAI opens the door to individual investors

content.text:
Here are the latest OpenAI news highlights as of today, April 7, 2026. If you want deeper details on any item, I can pull up the full article or official post.

- ChatGPT model retirements and transitions (February–March 2026)
  - On February 13, 2026, OpenAI retired several ChatGPT models, including GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini. GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking) was also retired in ChatGPT. The API usage remains unchanged for now. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/retiring-gpt-4o-and-older-models/?utm_source=openai))
  - On March 11, 2026, OpenAI retired GPT-5.1 Instant, Thinking, and Pro in ChatGPT. GPT-5.2 became the current ChatGPT option, with extended thinking features and other improvements. ([help.openai.com](https://help.openai.com/en/articles/6825453?utm_source=openai))
  - Notes and context about these changes are documented in OpenAI’s release notes and help center. ([help.openai.com](https://help.openai.com/en/articles/9624314-model-?utm_source=openai))

- OpenAI acquires TBPN (tech media property)
  - OpenAI announced the acquisition of TBPN (a tech/business talk show) on April 2, 2026, signaling a strategic push into media and AI communications. Bloomberg, Axios, and OpenAI’s own post corroborate the deal. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-02/openai-buys-tech-talk-show-tbpn-in-rare-move-into-media-business?utm_source=openai))

- OpenAI moves into broader investor/media avenues
  - In early April 2026, there were reports that OpenAI’s shares might appear in certain ETFs (e.g., ARK Invest’s ETFs), signaling growing investor visibility. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/03/31/openai-ai-stock-investors-ipo?utm_source=openai))

If you’d like, I can pull the exact blog posts or press releases for any of these items, or summarize other recent OpenAI topics (e.g., business updates, partnerships, or policy moves) with citations.
